# Purpose
This code defines a JavaScript module that provides functionality for creating and manipulating rectangles with color properties. It includes a constructor function `Rect` that initializes a rectangle with specified width, height, and color. The module also includes methods to calculate the area and perimeter of the rectangle, as well as a method to change the color. This code is a utility for handling basic geometric shapes with color attributes, suitable for use in graphical applications or games.
